violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the freezer by the swinging doors.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bare wood surfaces in the kitchen.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Vent hood unable to keep up. Staining the walls and ceiling
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Several areas in need of cleaning.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Carpet is dirty in the dining area.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Light shield missing in the dish washing area.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Vent hood unable to keep up.
